stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 File Standard Masses Table.
An aircraft fitted with 132 passenger seats is planned for a European holiday charter flight with a sport team of 32 sportsmen and 84 other adult passengers, 12 children and 5 infants seated on their parents laps. Given this information and assuming that the operator uses regulatory masses for the standard passengers (all adult) and checked baggage, what is the actual Traffic Load of this flight?

Average estimated mass of the sport team: 105 kg per person
Total passenger baggage on board: 62 pieces
Cargo: 500 kg
